basics.name: Amirreza Aleyasin
basics.summary: M.Sc. computational biologist with hands-on experience in deep learning for sequence-structure prediction, protein language models, and HPC-scale training pipelines.

work.company: Söding Lab, Max Planck Institute for Multidisciplinary Sciences
work.summary: Sequence–structure representation learning, deep-learning model training with custom 2D masked self-attention, transfer learning to underrepresented alleles, protein language models (ESM), likelihood-based loss design for noisy binding labels.

work.company: Hauschild Lab, UMG / Justus Liebig University Giessen
work.summary: Multi-modal survival modeling from somatic mutations (MAF), RNA expression, and clinical variables across federated clinical sites.

work.company: Dönitz Lab, University Medical Center Göttingen
highlights: Built a dynamic KEGG pathway visualizer

work.position: Tutor — Python Programming for Data Scientists
work.summary: Supported students during exercises, built web scrapers, and curated an NLP dataset for media-bias research.

education.institution: Azad University, Science and Research Branch, Tehran

interests.name: Archery
keywords: DHM Barebow Rookie — German University Championships

references.name: Dr. Johannes Söding
references.reference: Quantitative and Computational Biology, Max Planck Institute for Multidisciplinary Sciences, Göttingen. soeding@mpinat.mpg.de

references.name: Prof. Dr. Anne-Christin Hauschild
references.reference: Predictive Deep Learning for Medicine and Healthcare, Justus Liebig University Giessen. anne-christin.hauschild@uni-giessen.de

publications.name: PMGen: From Peptide–MHC Prediction to Neoantigen Generation
publications.summary: Second author (benchmarking and validation). An integrated framework for predicting, modeling, and generating peptides across both MHC classes.

teaching.description: Supported students during exercises, built web scrapers, curated NLP dataset for media-bias research.

awards.title: Niedersachsenstipendium
awards.summary: Graduate scholarship awarded by the State of Lower Saxony.

awards.title: Erasmus+ BIP
awards.summary: 2× travel and study grant (Spain and Sweden).

awards.title: Kaggle Gold Medal — Stanford RNA 3D Folding Part 2
awards.summary: Built a pipeline for RNA 3D structure prediction combining homology modeling, MSA-guided folding, deep learning for coordinate prediction, and PDB structure analysis.
